name: Does Siri optimization work differently in Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, or Salt Lake City?
description: The core setup is the same, but region, language, and location services can affect local Siri results.

mainEntity.name: Does Siri optimization work differently in Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, or Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, location can matter when the issue is tied to local business results, maps, or regional language settings. If you are in Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, or Salt Lake City, check that your language, region, and location services match your actual device use.
acceptedAnswer.description: The core setup is the same, but region, language, and location services can affect local Siri results.
